name: Chondathan Freebooter

items.name: Equipment:
items.entry: Choose A or B: (A) {@item Dagger|XPHB}, {@item Weaver's Tools|XPHB}, {@item Backpack|XPHB}, {@item Ball Bearings|XPHB}, {@item Basket|XPHB}, {@item Bedroll|XPHB}, {@item Bucket|XPHB}, {@item Rations|XPHB} (3 days' worth), {@item Rope|XPHB}, {@item Signal Whistle|XPHB}, {@item Traveler's Clothes|XPHB}, 38 GP; or (B) 50 GP

fluff: Though most youths in Chondath accept their four-year term of compulsory military service, you bristled at that authoritarian attempt to control your life. You forsook your nationhood, discarded your given name, and worked as a freebooter with the first ship that would have you. Since then, you've traveled the Vilhon Reach. Though you've never sailed more than a few dozen leagues from land, you make up for it with deep local connections and the breadth of your experiences.
